SEARCH
Module project
Package project.pomodoro.controller

Class PomodoroController

java.lang.Object
project.pomodoro.controller.PomodoroController
All Implemented Interfaces:
Initializable
public class PomodoroController extends Object implements Initializable
The Main Controller Manages Timer, Progress bar, TableView, Session DAO and CRUD logic in the Pomodoro application. Handles the start, pause and overall running of Timer / Progress Bar. Uses a background Timer thread and Platform.runLater(Runnable) to safely update JavaFX UI components. Handles the recording of finished and unfinished Pomodoro sessions to SessionDB. Handles the CRUD operations via TableView FXML
Author:
Minhman Do

    initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
    Initializes the editable TableView FXML TableView is populated by user's recorded Session data stored in the SQLite database Allows Users to directly update Session Data by selecting and editing cells Read and Update CRUD operations are handled here.

  • Constructor Details

    • PomodoroController

      public PomodoroController()

  • Method Details

    • getPomodoro

      public static PomodoroController getPomodoro()
      Returns the singleton instance of the PomodoroController. Creates a new instance if none exists. Also creates the DAO and the Table.
      Returns:
      The single instance of PomodoroController

    • setPomodoro

      public void setPomodoro(String sessionType, Label timerLabel, ProgressBar timerBar, Button startPauseBtn)
      Sets up the PomodoroController Assigns the required private fields for running Timer, Progress bar, Session, DAO, TableView and CRUD

    • unfinishedPomodoro

      public void unfinishedPomodoro()
      If user switches to another scene or resets, record how much time was spent this session. Handles CRUD - Update operation.

    • finishedPomodoro

      public void finishedPomodoro()
      If user successfuly finishes the session, record the full timespent and set completion as true. Disables the Start Pause Button to remind user to have rest or do some work. Handles CRUD - Update operation.

    • recordSession

      public void recordSession(String sessionTask)
      Record the initial Pomodoro session. Function is called the moment user first clicks the Start Button. Insert session via DAO. CRUD - Create Operation

    • runPomodoro

      public void runPomodoro()
      Starts or resumes the timer. On first call, creates a new Timer and begins countdown. Subsequent calls resume from paused state. ProgressBar is synced with Timer.

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      Initializes the editable TableView FXML TableView is populated by user's recorded Session data stored in the SQLite database Allows Users to directly update Session Data by selecting and editing cells Read and Update CRUD operations are handled here.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface Initializable

    • returnBtnClick

      public void returnBtnClick() throws Exception
      Return to Pomodoro Work session upon Button click Belongs to TableView FXML
      Throws:
      Exception

    • createBtnClick

      public void createBtnClick()
      Create a blank session upon Button click Belongs to TableView FXML Handles CRUD create and read operations

    • deleteBtnClick

      public void deleteBtnClick()
      Deletes a session upon Button click Belongs to TableView FXML Handles CRUD delete and read operations
